recommended_sap_control: Activate strict MIRO duplicate checks in OMRDC and monitor same-vendor near-match invoices before payment runs.
Enforce dual control over vendor master creation, bank account changes, and new-vendor payment review during the first 90 days.
Configure hard workflow stops when PO value exceeds employee authorization limits and review inactive approver assignments.
Add cumulative same-day vendor spend checks to MM release strategy and route threshold-adjacent POs to a second approver.
